replies.msg:
Pick of the settings tweaks is to lower volumetric lighting quality. Borderlands 3 uses the same kind of 'froxel' grid approach to its volumetrics as many other recent titles, and you can add a lot of performance with only a minimal, mostly unnoticeable hit to image quality. The medium preset adds an extra 34 per cent to frame-rate, making it the by far the most impactful setting beyond raw rendering resolution.

Beyond that, I'd recommend lowering the quality of screen-space reflections from ultra to medium, for an additional 10 per cent of performance. This keeps SSR as part of the visual mix, but in my tests, the extra precision offered by the higher quality renditions of the effect doesn't really register owing to the way Gearbox authors its artwork and how materials are handled generally in Borderlands 3.

貼link 喇
我估都係散熱model 加體質

我發覺CPU散熱十分影響張display card 温度
用緊前幾代i7 + 2080ti
cpu D15S 雙風扇 + display card 120 AIO (機箱尾pull)
如果唔谷cpu既話
個AIO叫可以頂得住張2080ti
但係一谷粒u
個D15S一熱起上黎就會燒埋張display card
2樣一齊熱
到最後我都唔知係120AIO壓唔住2080ti定咩

我諗緊其實D15/D15S係咪都唔係一定好過AIO

replies.msg:
https://linustechtips.com/main/topic/691408-2k-does-not-mean-2560%C3%971440/

4k係指:
4K resolution refers to a horizontal display resolution of approximately 4,000 pixels.[1] Digital television and digital cinematography commonly use several different 4K resolutions. In television and consumer media, 3840 × 2160 (4K UHD) is the dominant 4K standard, whereas the movie projection industry uses 4096 × 2160 (DCI 4K)

咁以上面的定義2k 就係指horizontal display resolution of approximately 2000 pixels:

2K resolution is a generic term for display devices or content having horizontal resolution of approximately 2,000 pixels.[1] Digital Cinema Initiatives (DCI) defines 2K resolution standard as 2048×1080.[2][3]

所以家用2k就係1920x1080

你試下攞條唔夠bandwidth 的hdmi去插PS4 開4k+HDR
PS4會同你講畫面會降為2K (1920x1080)

2560的解像又點會叫2k (2000)?
